_comment: MODERATE Claude Desktop config — tightly scoped MCP servers with single-directory access. Extensions disabled. Use for standard enterprise development teams.

filesystem-workspace._comment: Read/write access limited to one project directory. Scope to the narrowest path possible.

git-repo._comment: Git operations on a single repo only. Install via pip/uvx.

_enterprise_policies._comment: Deploy these via MDM — listed here as a reference, not part of the runtime config.
